---
title: "natural_features"
pagetitle: "natural_features"
toc: false
sidebar: false
page-layout: full
title-block-style: none
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-copy}
[Naturalistic stimulus features]{.eyebrow}

# natural_features turns stimuli into aligned feature workflows.

[Extract features from media or transcripts, align them to explicit timelines, and export tables without losing stimulus time or provenance.]{.lead}

[Start here](start/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Feature tour](tour/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
[API reference](reference/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}

[stimuli]{.kicker} [features]{.kicker} [timelines]{.kicker} [alignment]{.kicker}
:::
::: {.hero-code}
::: {.code-card}
[quickstart.py]{.code-card-title}
```python
from natural_features.workflows import extract_features

result = extract_features(
    "The scene opens on a quiet room.",
    features=["text.tokenize", "language.surface"],
)

aligned = result.align_to(
    "text.tokenize",
    features="language.surface",
)
aligned.to_dataframe().head()
```
:::
:::
:::

## In 30 seconds {.promise-heading}

One request returns a typed event object. The result below is generated when this page renders.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from natural_features.workflows import extract_features

result = extract_features(
    "The scene opens on a quiet room.",
    features=["text.tokenize", "language.surface"],
)
words = result.features["text.tokenize"]
aligned = result.align_to("text.tokenize", features="language.surface")
alignment_rows = aligned.to_rows()

print(f"""
::: {{.quick-result}}
::: {{.quick-stat}}
[request]{{.quick-label}}

`text.tokenize` + `language.surface`
:::
::: {{.quick-stat}}
[returns]{{.quick-label}}

`{type(result).__name__}`
:::
::: {{.quick-stat}}
[aligned rows]{{.quick-label}}

{len(alignment_rows)} dense rows -> word timeline
:::
::: {{.quick-words}}
[timeline]{{.quick-label}}

`{aligned.target.name}` · `{aligned.target.kind}`
:::
:::
""")
```

## Three contracts {.promise-heading}

::: {.promise-grid}
::: {.promise-card}
#### Stimulus wrappers keep time attached
Audio, video, image, and text inputs enter through typed wrappers before extraction. [Concept](concepts/stimuli.qmd)

[`AudioStimulus`]{.promise-tag}
:::

::: {.promise-card}
#### Feature objects carry schema and provenance
Dense features, events, and tracks have explicit time arrays and required metadata. [Concept](concepts/feature-objects.qmd)

[`FeatureSeries`]{.promise-tag}
:::

::: {.promise-card}
#### Timelines make alignment explicit
Align extracted outputs to word events, frames, or a custom timeline before exporting tables. [Concept](concepts/unified-workflow.qmd)

[`FeatureAlignment`]{.promise-tag}
:::
:::
